mapper.select: SELECT su.*, sd.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_dept sud on su.user_id = sud.user_id JOIN sys_dept sd on sud.dept_id = sd.dept_id WHERE sd.dept_id = #{deptId}
SELECT su.*, sp.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_post sup on su.user_id = sup.user_id JOIN sys_post sp on sup.post_id = sp.post_id WHERE sp.post_id = #{postId}
SELECT su.*, sr.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_role sur on su.user_id = sur.user_id JOIN sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.role_id WHERE sr.role_id = #{roleId}
SELECT su.*, sd.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_dept sud on su.user_id = sud.user_id JOIN sys_dept sd on sud.dept_id = sd.dept_id WHERE sd.dept_code = #{deptCode}
SELECT su.*, sp.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_post sup on su.user_id = sup.user_id JOIN sys_post sp on sup.post_id = sp.post_id WHERE sp.post_code = #{postCode}
SELECT su.*, sr.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_role sur on su.user_id = sur.user_id JOIN sys_role sr on sur.role_id = sr.role_id WHERE sr.role_key = #{roleKey}

SELECT su.*, sd.* FROM sys_user su JOIN sys_user_dept sud on su.user_id = sud.user_id JOIN sys_dept sd on sud.dept_id = sd.dept_id WHERE sd.dept_code = #{deptCode} OR find_in_set( (select dept_id from sys_dept where dept_code = #{deptCode} limit 1) , sd.ancestors);
